turns.question: How old are you?
turns.answer: I'm twenty-seven.

turns.question: How old is your daughter now?
turns.answer: She just turned five last month.

turns.question: How old were you when you moved here?
turns.answer: I was about nineteen when I moved.

turns.question: How old is your grandmother?
turns.answer: She's eighty-two this year.

turns.question: How old do you have to be to rent a car?
turns.answer: You usually have to be at least twenty-five.

turns.question: How old were you when you got your first job?
turns.answer: I was sixteen, working at a grocery store.

turns.question: How old is your dog?
turns.answer: He's about four years old now.

turns.question: How old do kids start school around here?
turns.answer: Usually around five or six years old.

turns.question: How old was your dad when he retired?
turns.answer: He was sixty-five when he retired.

turns.question: How old is your oldest sibling?
turns.answer: My oldest sister is thirty-four.

turns.question: How old were you when you learned to drive?
turns.answer: I was seventeen when I got my license.

turns.question: How old does someone have to be to vote?
turns.answer: You have to be at least eighteen.

turns.question: How old is this building, do you know?
turns.answer: I think it's around a hundred years old.

turns.question: How old was your mom when she had you?
turns.answer: She was twenty-nine when she had me.

turns.question: How old is too old to start learning something new?
turns.answer: Honestly, I don't think there's an age limit.

turns.question: How old were you in this photo?
turns.answer: I think I was about ten in that one.

turns.question: How old do you have to be to get a credit card?
turns.answer: Usually eighteen, sometimes with a co-signer.

turns.question: How old is the youngest person on the team?
turns.answer: The youngest is only twenty-two.

turns.question: How old were your parents when they got married?
turns.answer: They were both twenty-four.

turns.question: How old is your car at this point?
turns.answer: It's about eight years old now.

turns.question: How old were you when you first traveled abroad?
turns.answer: I was twenty-one on my first trip.

turns.question: How old is your niece these days?
turns.answer: She just turned twelve last week.

turns.question: How old do you think that tree is?
turns.answer: It's probably over fifty years old.

turns.question: How old was he when he started the company?
turns.answer: He was only twenty-six at the time.

turns.question: How old do you have to be to retire early?
turns.answer: It varies, but often around fifty-five.

turns.question: How old is your best friend compared to you?
turns.answer: She's actually two years older than me.

turns.question: How old were you when you graduated high school?
turns.answer: I was eighteen when I graduated.

turns.question: How old is the company you work for?
turns.answer: It's been around for about fifteen years.

turns.question: How old is your youngest cousin?
turns.answer: He's only three years old.

turns.question: How old were you when you started this hobby?
turns.answer: I think I was around thirteen.

turns.question: How old is your grandfather turning this year?
turns.answer: He's turning ninety this year.

turns.question: How old is the average student in this program?
turns.answer: Most students are around twenty-three.

turns.question: How old were you when you got married?
turns.answer: I was twenty-eight when I got married.

turns.question: How old is your phone at this point?
turns.answer: It's about three years old now.

turns.question: How old do you have to be to work here?
turns.answer: You need to be at least sixteen.

turns.question: How old is your teacher, roughly?
turns.answer: I'd guess she's in her early forties.

turns.question: How old were you when you learned English?
turns.answer: I started when I was about seven.

turns.question: How old is your neighbor's kid now?
turns.answer: He just turned nine, actually.

turns.question: How old do you have to be for this ride?
turns.answer: You need to be at least twelve.

turns.question: How old is your favorite actor, do you know?
turns.answer: I think he's somewhere around fifty.
